name: Island Snow
tagline: Obama's Kailua go-to — every presidential visit = a stop here. Also a legit surf shop.
mustOrder: any flavor with vanilla ice cream on the bottom (the Island Snow signature)
li hing mui powder on top
parking: Parking in the Kailua Shopping Center lot next door
talkStory: A Kailua institution since 1979, Island Snow was a legit surf and skate shop long before Barack Obama made it famous. Every Christmas vacation during his presidency, Obama's motorcade would pull up for shave ice -- Secret Service and all. Owner Craig Sugihara sponsors local surf groms and the shop is deeply woven into Kailua's beach culture. The signature move is a scoop of vanilla ice cream buried at the bottom of every cone, which you discover as the shave ice melts down.
